jobs.title: Disc processing center and laser programmer (unloader)
jobs.salary_range: Salary according to your experience (Technology
jobs.meta_description: Looking for a Laser Programmer (Engraver) job in Vaasa? Steelcomp Vaasa Oy is seeking motivated candidates—apply today.
jobs.description: Steelcomp Vaasa Oy is seeking a Laser Programmer (Engraver) for their growing and stable contract manufacturing company in the metal sector. This role involves programming sheet machining centers and laser cutting machines, optimizing material use, and collaborating with a competent team to develop skills at the heart of modern production. Previous experience in similar tasks, good technical documentation knowledge, disc manufacturing technology proficiency, and English language skills are required. The position offers a significant role within a growing company, daily work in one shift, salary based on experience (Technology industry test), and opportunities for skill development. Interested candidates should apply by May 24, 2026, with their CV sent to Laura Rekrytointi at veera.
what_we_expect: You have previous experience in similar tasks and a good understanding of technical documentation and drawings
Good knowledge of disc manufacturing technology, previous programming experience and disc work center / laser user experience is an advantage
Good knowledge of Finnish and English. Your English doesn't have to be perfect, but at least you use it boldly
job_responsibilities: You play an important role starting from the first stages of our production, determining the timely programming of our sheet machining centers and laser cutting machines, taking into account the best possible material use planning
In your work, you will not only program our laser and combi machines for cutting, but also demolition robot of the latest technology
what_we_offer: Everyday work in one shift
A significant role in a growing and stable company
A competent and supportive team around you
The opportunity to develop your skills at the heart of modern production
Salary according to your experience (Technology industry test)
jobs.search_keywords: disc processing center, laser programmer, unloader, contract manufacturing, metal sector

jobs.title: IT Director
jobs.salary_range: The salary range is 4000-5000€/month, depending on your experience.
jobs.meta_description: Simucube is looking for a skilled IT Director in Tampere. Don't miss this opportunity—apply today.
jobs.description: IT Manager Simucube is a game-changer in the world of sim racing and simulators. At the heart of Hervanta, Tampere, our skilled and warm-hearted team of 65 professionals creates products known for their top performance and high quality. With exciting projects underway and our business growing fast, we are now looking for a new colleague to join us as IT Manager. This is not a maintenance role. This is a foundation role. You will build, structure, and take full ownership of Simucube’s IT function, ensuring our systems, tools, and ways of working support both today’s operations and tomorrow’s growth. You’ll report directly to our CEO and work closely with teams across the organization.
what_we_expect: Your responsibilities will include
Establishing and owning Simucube's IT function, building the structure, documentation, and processes we currently lack.
Taking full ownership of our Microsoft environment (M365, Azure), identity and access management, and device lifecycle
Leading collaboration with our external IT partner and ensuring smooth day-to-day operations
Strengthening IT security and continuity (MFA, backups, risk management, incident response practices)
Driving practical AI enablement and contributing to ERP development from an architecture and integration perspective
job_responsibilities: Establishing and owning Simucube's IT function, building the structure, documentation, and processes we currently lack.
Taking full ownership of our Microsoft environment (M365, Azure), identity and access management, and device lifecycle
Leading collaboration with our external IT partner and ensuring smooth day-to-day operations
Strengthening IT security and continuity (MFA, backups, risk management, incident response practices)
Driving practical AI enablement and contributing to ERP development from an architecture and integration perspective
We believe this role will suit you if you: Have experience building or significantly developing IT environments in a growing organization
what_we_offer: People-first culture: Real ownership: This is a rare opportunity to build an IT function from scratch in a fast-growing technology company.

Flexibility and trust: We trust you to manage your time. Enjoy flexible working hours and hybrid work options. You’ll have access to top-notch tools and software, and yes, you’re welcome to use our equipment (including 3D printers) for your own hobby or DIY projects.

Continuous learning: We support your growth. From training programs to literature of your choice, we want every team member to keep developing their skills and stay curious – especially in emerging areas like AI and automation.
About us
Simucube (Granite Devices Oy) was founded in 2007 and is fully owned by its employees. In 2024, our revenue was over 15 M€.
Interested in joining us?
jobs.search_keywords: IT Director Simucube Tampere other
